name: Maintenance Release v3.11.5 - POS and Back Office
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Maintenance Release v3.11.5 - POS and Back Office"}], "data-id": "maintenance-release-v3-11-5-pos-and-back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Release date:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 10th March 2020"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release we've introduced a new Payment Type for The Card Network, as well as made 5 improvements and resolutions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#card-network", "children": [{"text": "New Payment Type - The Card Network"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#improvements", "children": [{"text": "Improvements and Resolutions"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "New Payment Type - The Card Network", "bold": true}], "data-id": "new-payment-type-the-card-network"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We've added a new Payment Type to use in POS for "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fthecardnetwork.com.au%2F", "children": [{"text": "The Card Network"}]}, {"text": ", a popular Gift Card provider. Using this Payment Type, payments can be allocated to The Card Network for reconciliation and reporting."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Card Network Payment Type is used for reporting purposes only and is not an integrated payment system"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the new Payment Type:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > payment Types", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the line for "}, {"text": "The Card Network", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tick the options for Enabled, POS and Loyalty as required (you can also adjust the Loyalty Multiplier as necessary)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTeaEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTeaEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 (100).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accounting Link Customers: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "If you are using the Accounting Link integration you will need to re-map your Payment Types, otherwise you will encounter an error when trying to import your data. Refer to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fress.zendesk.com%2Fhc%2Fen-us%2Farticles%2F115002321473", "children": [{"text": "Accounting Link - Mapping a New Payment Type"}]}, {"text": " for more information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "Improvements and Resolutions", "bold": true}], "data-id": "improvements-and-resolutions"}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Newsletters"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Unsubscribe link now redirects to a HTTPS:// secure URL"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POS"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Performance improvements"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POS"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The default search field (automatically selected as the active field when clicking the Customers tab) is now automatically selected with the cursor flashing as per the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Customer-Settings", "children": [{"text": "Customer Settings"}]}, {"text": " "}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Account Statements"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A \"Loading\" icon will now display the entire time it takes to load the search results"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Account Statements"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Performance improvements have been made to allow Account Statements to be run for large queries"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-c9fc1ff7"}]
